CustomField.formula: IF( HOMEtracker__Certified_Percent_AMI__c < 0.5, '<50%', IF(HOMEtracker__Certified_Percent_AMI__c >= 0.5 && HOMEtracker__Certified_Percent_AMI__c < 0.6, '50-59%', IF(HOMEtracker__Certified_Percent_AMI__c >= 0.6 && HOMEtracker__Certified_Percent_AMI__c < 0.7, '60-69%', IF(HOMEtracker__Certified_Percent_AMI__c >= 0.7 && HOMEtracker__Certified_Percent_AMI__c < 0.8, '70-79%', IF(HOMEtracker__Certified_Percent_AMI__c >= 0.8 && HOMEtracker__Certified_Percent_AMI__c < 0.9, '80-89%', IF(HOMEtracker__Certified_Percent_AMI__c >= 0.9 && HOMEtracker__Certified_Percent_AMI__c < 1.0, '90-99%', IF(HOMEtracker__Certified_Percent_AMI__c >= 1.0 && HOMEtracker__Certified_Percent_AMI__c < 1.1, '100-109%', IF(HOMEtracker__Certified_Percent_AMI__c >= 1.1 && HOMEtracker__Certified_Percent_AMI__c < 1.2, '110-119%', IF(HOMEtracker__Certified_Percent_AMI__c >= 1.2, '120%+','')))))))))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This is a formula field used to group Certified Percent of AMI (Gross) for reports and dashboards.
CustomField.label: Certified AMI % Range (Gross)
